mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE

SELECT NVL(HP.SEXCODE, 'unknown') AS CODE, NVL(GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HP.SEXCODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'Không xác định') AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE GROUP BY HP.SEXCODE ORDER BY HP.SEXCODE

SELECT NVL(H.EMP_TYPE_CODE, 'unknown') AS CODE, NVL(GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'Không xác định') AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE GROUP BY H.EMP_TYPE_CODE ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT NVL(H.DEPTNO, 'unknown') AS CODE, NVL(GET_DEPT_NAME(H.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'Không xác định') AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE GROUP BY H.DEPTNO ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT NVL(H.POST_FAMILY, 'unknown') AS CODE, NVL(GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'Không xác định') AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE GROUP BY H.POST_FAMILY ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT NVL(H.POST_GRADE_NO, 'unknown') AS CODE, NVL(GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'Không xác định') AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE GROUP BY H.POST_GRADE_NO ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT SORT_NO AS CODE, AGE_GRP AS LABEL, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN HP.DOB IS NULL THEN '8' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) < 25 THEN '1' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 25 AND 30 THEN '2' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 31 AND 35 THEN '3' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 36 AND 40 THEN '4' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 41 AND 45 THEN '5' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 46 AND 50 THEN '6' ELSE '7' END AS SORT_NO, CASE WHEN HP.DOB IS NULL THEN 'Không xác định' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) < 25 THEN 'Dưới 25' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 25 AND 30 THEN '25 - 30' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 31 AND 35 THEN '31 - 35' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 36 AND 40 THEN '36 - 40' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 41 AND 45 THEN '41 - 45' WHEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, HP.DOB) / 12) BETWEEN 46 AND 50 THEN '46 - 50' ELSE 'Trên 50' END AS AGE_GRP FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE ) GROUP BY SORT_NO, AGE_GRP ORDER BY SORT_NO
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_Q.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT H.EMPID AS EMPID, H.LOCAL_NAME AS LOCAL_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(H.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPTNAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_FAMILY_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, HP.DOB AS DOB, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HP.SEXCODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SEX_NAME, TO_CHAR(H.DATE_STARTED, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS DATE_STARTED, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(H.EMP_OFFICE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_OFFICE_NAME FROM HR_EMPLOYEE H, HR_DEPARTMENT D, HR_PERSONAL_INFO HP WHERE ORDER BY H.EMPID ASC ) INNER_Q WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=INTEGER} + #{length, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=INTEGER}
